chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA Present: Irshad Ali Shah, J. Agha Faisal, J. CP D466of 2021: Syed Ali Raza Shah @ Jani Shah vs. Province of Sindh, through Chief Secretary & others For the Petitioner: Mr. Safdar Ali Bhutto, Advocate For the Respondents: Mr.Abdul Hamid Bhurgri, Addl. A.G. Dates of hearing: 22.02.2022 Date of announcement: 22.02.2022 ORDER Agha Faisal, J. The petitioner has challenged notifications restricting his movement in the public interest, issued by the Home Department, Government of Sindh, however, it is manifest that the tenancy of the same has since expired. On 16.11.2021, petitioner’s counsel was specifically queried as to how post expiry of the said notifications this petition could be maintained, however, he has remained unable to satisfy the court in such regard till date. In view hereof it is manifest that this petition has become infructuous and is disposed of accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE
